creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
after some IRC discussion on the #openvpn-devel package, as interim status message:

the upstream expectation would be to have one definitive vars file (which might mean that I remove the @sample on the vars.example and let the user handle that, and possibly add pkg-message instructions), but we can expect some assessment in the Github issue <https://github.com/OpenVPN/easy-rsa/issues/589> very soon
